title: Contract-03: RegisterUser Adapter (NestJS & Prisma) - RED Phase
constraints: Hexagonal Architecture: Adapters (in/web, out/persistence) must only communicate with the Application layer via Ports or Use Cases. Do not leak Prisma into Domain/Application.
NestJS Framework: Controller must only handle HTTP routing (req/res) and DTO validation, then immediately delegate to the UseCase.
Cryptography: Argon2 implementation must strictly adhere to the IPasswordHasher interface.
definition_of_done: [x] 1. Create unit/integration test files for Controller, Prisma Repository, and Argon2 Hasher.
[x] 2. Run vitest -> MUST FAIL (RED Phase because implementations don't exist yet).
[x] 4. Wait for user approval before moving to GREEN phase.
